introSection: Dæmonen is a steel roller coaster located at Tivoli Gardens in Copenhagen, Sjælland, Denmark. It is a Floorless Coaster installation from Bolliger & Mabillard. Dæmonen is Danish for Demon.
fullText: Dæmonen is a steel roller coaster located at Tivoli Gardens in Copenhagen, Sjælland, Denmark. It is a Floorless Coaster installation from Bolliger & Mabillard. Dæmonen is Danish for Demon.
